title: UserProfile
description: Persisted calibration result for a single user. Written by the Signal pipeline after calibration confirmation. Read by the Driver runtime to validate that incoming gesture_ids are known.

confirmed.description: User explicitly confirmed this gesture feels intentional.

variance_score.description: Score from the auto-discovery variance analysis. Higher = more reliably controllable.

signature.description: Opaque classifier-specific calibration data (thresholds, baseline landmark positions, etc).
